SEQUENCE.COMMENT: uxlrLookupSimple - service for performing a single record UXLR lookup by keys only

MAP.COMMENT: blankIfNull all input keys, '0' ifNull on handleErrors

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

EXIT.NAME: tableCode=='' || uxlrKey01==''
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: FE0000 Input parameters required tableCode='%tableCode%' key01='%key01%'
EXIT.COMMENT: FE0000 Input parameters required tableCode='%tableCode%' key01='%key01%'

MAP.COMMENT: sHandleErr = left(sHandleErr,1)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: status=0 normal successful completion

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: read the metadata about the tablecode (sNumkeys, sNumvals)

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE fKey00='0-uxlr' AND fKey01='tabledata' AND fKey02='%tableCode%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE fKey00='0-uxlr' AND fKey01='tabledata' AND fKey02='%tableCode%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

INVOKE.NAME: sRows != 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE8106 Metadata for %tableCode% could not be found - please check spelling

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: FE8106 Metadata for %tableCode% could not be found - please check spelling

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: drop

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error) (default)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: build a SQL string from the set of input keys and execute it

MAP.COMMENT: sSql = 'SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE ' and sIndex = -1

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.NAME: uxlrKey02==''
MAP.COMMENT: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.NAME: uxlrKey03==''
MAP.COMMENT: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.NAME: uxlrKey04==''
MAP.COMMENT: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND fKey03='%uxlrKey03%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND fKey03='%uxlrKey03%'

MAP.NAME: uxlrKey05==''
MAP.COMMENT: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND ... AND fKey04='%uxlrKey04%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND fKey03='%uxlrKey03%' AND fKey04='%uxlrKey04%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND fKey03='%uxlrKey03%' AND fKey04='%uxlrKey04%' AND fKey05='%uxlrKey05%' AND fKey06='%uxlrKey06%' AND fKey07='%uxlrKey07%' AND fKey08='%uxlrKey08%' AND fKey09='%uxlrKey09%'

MAP.NAME: uxlrKey11==''
MAP.COMMENT: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND ... AND fKey10='%uxlrKey10%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND fKey03='%uxlrKey03%' AND fKey04='%uxlrKey04%' AND fKey05='%uxlrKey05%' AND fKey06='%uxlrKey06%' AND fKey07='%uxlrKey07%' AND fKey08='%uxlrKey08%' AND fKey09='%uxlrKey09%' AND fKey10='%uxlrKey10%'

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND ... AND fKey11='%uxlrKey11%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: fKey00='%tableCode%' AND fKey01='%uxlrKey01%' AND fKey02='%uxlrKey02%' AND fKey03='%uxlrKey03%' AND fKey04='%uxlrKey04%' AND fKey05='%uxlrKey05%' AND fKey06='%uxlrKey06%' AND fKey07='%uxlrKey07%' AND fKey08='%uxlrKey08%' AND fKey09='%uxlrKey09%' AND fKey10='%uxlrKey10%' AND fKey11='%uxlrKey11%'

BRANCH.COMMENT: check that they didnt supply too many keys or too many values

INVOKE.NAME: sKeycnt < 0
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 Please provide at least one key

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: FE0000 Please provide at least one key

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

INVOKE.NAME: sKeycnt != sNumkeys
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 You supplied %sKeycnt% keys - the table has %sNumkeys% defined

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: FE0000 You supplied %sKeycnt% keys - the table has %sNumkeys% defined

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: sSql = replace( sSql, " fKey00='ECM2EDI' ", " (fKey00='ECM2EDI' OR fKey00='ECM2EDINA') " )

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: now based on how many records we got back, build some output

MAP.COMMENT: FE8108 Input keys returned %sRows% records using %sSql% %sWhereClause%

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: this section is merely updating the date accessed column - don't care if this succeeds or fails

MAP.COMMENT: get sDateAccessed from the record

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

record.value: this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: false (default)
true

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TUXLR SET FDATEACCESSED='%sDateAccessed%' WHERE %sWhereClause%

array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: drop

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error) (default)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)
